analysis: The later evidence confirms the publication freeze rather than changing it. Pressure basis is decomposed well enough for the diagnostic residual, but velocity/qref basis, straight/developing reference, component isolation, recirculation, source-envelope geometry, and same-QOI uncertainty still block component or cluster coefficient use.
next_useful_actions: harvest nonrecirculating same-topology anchor before ordinary component_K review
complete same-QOI time and mesh uncertainty for the exact pressure residual
recover bend radius/part/source-envelope fields for the lower-right corner
keep F6 endpoint pressure-delta evidence separate from component or cluster rows
